title: rosa canina var. reuteri
intro: Rosa canina var. reuteri is a specific variety of the wild rose plant, known for its exceptional medicinal properties and health benefits. It is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine. The plant is commonly used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as to alleviate menstrual cramps and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. reuteri include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin.
